creator: neal@nelson.name
text:
Edwin Groothuis writes: 

> Maintainer of devel/py-zopeInterface, 
> 
> Please note that PR ports/160988 has just been submitted. 
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it. 
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/160988 
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org 
> 
> !DSPAM:4e7e2d91680652100411531! 
> 

Please go ahead with this patch. 

Thanks.
